question: How many musical instruments do I currently own?
ground_truth_answer: I currently own 4 musical instruments. I've had the Fender Stratocaster electric guitar for 5 years, the Yamaha FG800 acoustic guitar for 8 years, the 5-piece Pearl Export drum set for an unspecified amount of time, and the Korg B1 piano for 3 years.

retrieval_results.context:
User owns a black Fender Stratocaster electric guitar
User includes drumsticks and keys with the drum set
User owns a Korg B1 digital piano
User has owned the black Fender Stratocaster for about 5 years
User has owned a Yamaha FG800 acoustic guitar for about 8 years
User frequently plays the Korg B1 digital piano, especially after starting guitar lessons
User is upgrading to a new drum set
